MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON OCT-01-2015 IN 206, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO SPECIALLY SET TRIAL DATE IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL APPEARED AND SPECIALLY APPEARED FOR DEFENDANT. COUNSEL REPRESENTED TO THE COURT THAT THIS CASE HAS TENTATIVELY SETTLED BUT NEEDS A TRIAL DATE IN CASE SETTLEMENT IS NOT FINALIZED. A COURT TRIAL IS SET ON 1/19/16 AT 9:30 A.M. IN DEPT. 206.
